message:
feat(raptorq): ASUPERSYNC decode error variants for cancellation and runtime failures

- DecodeError::Cancelled for execution context cancellation
- DecodeError::Runtime for orchestration failures (join errors, etc.)
- fcp-async-core dependency added for future context-aware decode paths
- Tests for both new error variant display strings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
